name: Lady Fielding

sheet.name: Lady Fielding
sheet.background_story:
Daughter to a simple farmer, she dreamed of joining the Royal Guard since childhood and trained diligently through her youth to be accepted into the military academy.

She was eventually promoted to captain, and made King Offling's personal guard for her dedication, strength, and intuition.

Was once friends with Eira the Wyrd.

Plunged unto the depths of The Void, forsaking duty.
